The Artist

The
Story

"From a small-town stage to cinematic scores — a legacy in the making."

Jitesh Krishna is a singer, songwriter, music composer, and live performer whose sound spans soulful Telugu melodies, mass compositions, romantic ballads, and dramatic film scores.

His breakthrough film Adhyayam earned a standing ovation from his entire hometown — cementing his identity as a composer who makes audiences feel, not just listen.

10+Songs
5+Films
2014State 2nd
7th Grade
The First Note
Discovered music and began singing — a voice that would one day move thousands.
2014
AP Youth Festival — State 2nd Place
Division → District → State. First major recognition as a vocalist on the grandest stage.
College
Red Rockers — First Band
Performing across Nellore and Hyderabad, building the raw energy that defines every live show today.
2019
Naanam Anuvu Anuvu — First Original
The debut composition. A singer became a songwriter — a creator with his own voice.
Film
Adhyayam — Standing Ovation
The turning point. Music that moved an entire hometown. That moment defined everything.
Now
Sarvotthama Band — Co-Founder
Performing, creating, connecting — show after show, stage after stage.
♪♫♩♬♪

On Stage

Live &
Band

From college stages with Red Rockers across Nellore and Hyderabad, to co-founding Sarvotthama Band — corporate events, colleges, and private shows across the region.
